title: Narumugaiye Narumugaiye Lyrics Iruvar
stanzas:
Narumugaiye Narumugaiye
nee oru naaligai nillaai
sengani ooriya vaai thirandhu
nee oru thirumozhi sollaai

attrai thingal annilavil
netri tharala neer vadiya
kottrai poigai aadiyaval
neeyaa (2)

thirumagane thirumagane
nee oru naaligai paaraai
vennira puraviyil vandhavane
vel vizhi mozhigal kaelaai

attrai thingal annilavil
kottrai poigai aadugaiyil
ottrai paarvai paarthavanum
neeyaa (2)

mangai maan vizhi ambugal
en maar thulaithathenna(2)

nilaavile paartha vannam
kanaavile thondrum innum(2)
ilaithaen thudithaen
porukkavillai
idaiyil megalai irukkavillai

Narumugaiye Narumugaiye
nee oru naaligai nillaai
sengani ooriya vaai thirandhu
nee oru thirumozhi sollaai

attrai thingal annilavil
kottrai poigai aadugaiyil
ottrai paarvai paarthavanum
neeyaa

attrai thingal annilavil
netri tharala neer vadiya
kottrai poigai aadiyaval
neeyaa

Yaayum yaayum  yaaraagi
ennul nenjin nernthathenna(2)
yaanum neeyum evvazhi aridhum
uravu serndhathenna

orey oru theendal seithaai
uyir kudi poothathenna(2)
sembuzham serndha neerthuli
pol ambudai nenjam
kalandhathenna...

thirumagane thirumagane
nee oru naaligai paaraai
vennira puraviyil vandhavane
vel vizhi mozhigal kaelaai (2)

attrai thingal annilavil
kottrai poigai aadugaiyil
ottrai paarvai paarthavanum
neeyaa

attrai thingal annilavil

neeyaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Narumugaiye Narumugaiye'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and admiration, using poetic imagery to convey love and longing.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Iruvar'?

In Iruvar, the song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their connection.

Who are the singers of 'Narumugaiye Narumugaiye'?

The song features the melodious voices of Bombay Jayashree and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Narumugaiye Narumugaiye' was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was 'Narumugaiye Narumugaiye' released?

The song was released on January 14, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Narumugaiye Narumugaiye', the enchanting duet unfolds a tale of love and admiration, set against the backdrop of the film Iruvar. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of longing and romance, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters. As the singers weave their voices together, listeners are transported into a world of poetic beauty and deep connection. This timeless classic remains a favorite for romantic occasions, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Narumugaiye Narumugaiye from Iruvar is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Bombay Jayashree and Unnikrishnan, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song creates an ethereal atmosphere that resonates with love. Experience the lyrical poetry and melodic charm that make this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Oh beautiful one, you are like a moment, opening your mouth like a precious gem, you speak a divine word.
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
Oh divine one, you are like a moment, you have come in the white light, you hear the words of the bright-eyed one.
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
With beautiful eyes, my heart is in turmoil.
When I see you, what will happen to me?
In the moonlight, the colors appear, they still arise, I have not found a way to hold them, there is no cloud in between.
Oh beautiful one, you are like a moment, opening your mouth like a precious gem, you speak a divine word.
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
Who are you, who has entered my heart? You and I are connected in a way that is hard to understand.
You have made a single choice, what will happen to the life that has blossomed? My heart is mixed like the water of a red flower...
Oh divine one, you are like a moment, you have come in the white light, you hear the words of the bright-eyed one.
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
In the moonlight, you shine like a star, you are the one who dances in the water, are you?
